scenarios.name: Warm Interested Lead
scenarios.transcript: SDR (Alex): Hi, is this Margaret? Hey, this is Alex calling from National Benefits Group. How are you doing today?

scenarios.name: Skeptical Prospect - Scam Concern
scenarios.transcript:
SDR (Alex): Hi, is this Robert? Hey, this is Alex calling from National Benefits Group. How are you doing today?
Prospect: (slowly and cautiously) Ah, who is this again? You say you're Alex from National Benefits Group? What's this about? I didn't call them, they didn't call me. How did you get my number? (pausing) I'm doing alright, I guess. But I'm not sure I want to talk to some stranger on the phone. What's this call about? You're not trying to sell me something, are ya?

scenarios.name: Not Interested - Soft Close Needed
scenarios.transcript: SDR (Alex): Hi, is this Dorothy? Hey, this is Alex calling from National Benefits Group. How are you doing today?

scenarios.name: Callback Request / Busy Prospect
scenarios.transcript: SDR (Alex): Hi, is this James? Hey, this is Alex calling from National Benefits Group. How are you doing today?

scenarios.name: Voicemail — Leave Message
scenarios.transcript: SDR (Alex): Hi, is this Patricia? Hey, this is Alex calling from National Benefits Group. How are you doing today?

scenarios.name: Already Has Coverage
scenarios.transcript:
SDR (Alex): Hi, is this Harold? Hey, this is Alex calling from National Benefits Group. How are you doing today?
Prospect: Hi Alex, this is Harold. I'm doing alright, thanks for asking. What can I help you with?

scenarios.name: Hard No — Graceful Exit
scenarios.transcript: SDR (Alex): Hi, is this Frank? Hey, this is Alex calling from National Benefits Group. How are you doing today?
